## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] `go test ./... -race` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (README / ROADMAP)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `test:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `ci:`)
